name: Bank7 Corp.
business: Bank7 Corp. is a bank holding company that provides loan and deposit products to business owners and entrepreneurs through its wholly-owned subsidiary Bank7. It operates twelve full-service branches in Oklahoma, the Dallas/Fort Worth, Texas metropolitan area, and Kansas. The company generates most of its revenue from interest income on loans and short-term investments, primarily funded by deposits.
sellsTo: commercial borrowers in real estate, energy, hospitality, and agriculture

exposures.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, our energy loans, which include loans to exploration and production companies, midstream companies, purchasers of mineral and royalty interests and service providers totaled $156.8 million, or 9.7% of total loans, as compared to $133.3 million, or 9.5% of total loans as of December 31, 2024.

At December 31, 2025, this exposure was approximately $310.6 million, or 19.3%, of the total loan portfolio, along with an additional $17.8 million in unfunded debt, as compared to $259.1 million, or 18.5%, of the total loan portfolio, along with an additional $2.9 million in unfunded debt as of December 31, 2024.
As of December 31, 2025, our Regulatory CRE represented 261.89% of our total Bank capital and our construction, land development and other land loans represented 85.91% of our total Bank capital
